name: Missed work after comp injury in South Salt Lake, how get paid?

mainEntity.name: Missed work after comp injury in South Salt Lake, how get paid?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Temporary total disability pays 66-75% wages during recovery.** Utah/Idaho standard[1][6]. **Key factors:** Doctor restrictions trigger; max benefits vary. **Practical guidance:** Submit wage stubs, attend therapy. Track days off. **Payments start after 3-7 day wait.**
